name: Sentry Monitor
description: Forward error-bearing OpenClaw lifecycle events to Sentry (model calls, agent turns, tool calls, message deliveries, subagents, cron runs, abnormal session ends) plus node-level uncaught exceptions / unhandled rejections.

dsn.description: Sentry DSN. If unset, the BOON_SENTRY_DSN env var is used. If neither is set, the plugin is inactive (logs a warn and registers no hooks).

environment.description: Sentry environment tag. Defaults to the host's hostname.

tracesSampleRate.description: Sentry traces sample rate. Defaults to 0 (no performance tracing — error events only).
